title: Backend Developer Vacancy at PharmEasy Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at PharmEasy Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the PharmEasy Ventures Solutions family as a Backend Developer in Ranchi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About PharmEasy Ventures Solutions:
PharmEasy Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PharmEasy Ventures Solutions!
